description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration with a compact, angular frame and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The body is finished in a dark blue and black digital pattern, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with a vented handguard and a visible muzzle device at the front. The stock is integrated into the main body, contributing to the weapon's compactness and maneuverability. The trigger and pistol grip are positioned well forward, characteristic of bullpup designs, and the magazine appears to be internal or not externally visible. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with a blue-black digital camo finish, integrated carrying handle, and short barrel, designed for urban tactical use. Its angular frame and robust build suggest a mix of metal and polymer materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, digital camo pattern, integrated handle, and short barrel with vented handguard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same angular frame, handle, and barrel details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the compact, streamlined design.
